A focused job board for editors

Video Editor Jobs

One place for editing work: creator teams, agencies, brands, podcasts, studios, and remote-first production teams.

Built to index the category now, then connect qualified editors and hiring teams through the TalentPrism backend as the job graph comes online.

Role examples

Early categories before live listings

Remote

Short-form video editor

Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, creator teams

  • fast turnaround
  • caption styling
  • social hooks
Remote or hybrid

YouTube channel editor

Long-form YouTube, podcasts, education, creator-led brands

  • story pacing
  • retention edits
  • thumbnail collaboration
Contract

Brand video editor

B2B, ecommerce, product launches, paid social

  • motion basics
  • ad variants
  • stakeholder review
Entry level

Assistant editor

Post houses, agencies, production teams

  • media management
  • proxy workflows
  • Premiere or Resolve

The first job categories we are indexing

The launch map starts with high-intent searches: remote video editor jobs, freelance video editor jobs, YouTube video editor jobs, video editing jobs, entry-level editor roles, and city-specific searches in production-heavy markets.

Why this should be narrower than a generic job board

Editing roles are often posted with unclear expectations. The useful signals are workflow, turnaround time, content format, software stack, source footage quality, review cadence, and whether the role is creator-side, agency-side, or brand-side.

Get on the early list

Static launch mode: this opens an email draft until the TalentPrism intake endpoint is connected.

Hiring teams

Post a video editor role early

Good listings should include content format, edit volume, software stack, compensation, timezone or location, revision cadence, and portfolio examples.

Connect this form to TalentPrism when the backend posting flow is ready.

Answers

Questions editors and hiring teams ask first

What kinds of video editor jobs will be listed?

The first version will focus on remote, freelance, YouTube, social video, podcast, brand, agency, and assistant editor roles.

Is Video Editor Jobs live yet?

The SEO launch site is live-ready first. Job listings and matching workflows are planned to connect through TalentPrism as the backend source of truth.

Can employers post roles?

Employers can register early interest. The first posting flow should collect role type, editing stack, content format, compensation, timezone, and portfolio requirements.

Video Editor Jobs

SEO launch site for videoeditorjobs.com. Built to start crawl discovery before the live TalentPrism job graph is connected.
